mapper.sql: id, token, db_create_time as createTime, db_modify_time as updateTime, workflow_definition_id, namespace, name, display_name, state, start_time, end_time, parent_id, parent_activity_id, context, definition_variables, worker_node, version, biz_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_instance (token, workflow_definition_id, namespace, name, display_name, state, start_time, end_time, parent_id, parent_activity_id, context, definition_variables, worker_node, version, biz_id, db_create_time) VALUES (#{token}, #{workflowDefinitionId}, #{namespace}, #{name}, #{displayName}, #{state}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{parentId}, #{parentActivityId}, #{context}, #{definitionVariables}, #{workerNode}, #{version}, #{bizId}, #{createTime})
